overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban Los Santos neighborhood. The character navigates sidewalks lined with palm trees, passes a distinctive blue apartment building with a ground-floor restaurant, crosses multiple streets, and moves through areas with moderate pedestrian activity and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with grassy median and approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a grassy median, approaching a traffic intersection with the sun creating lens flare

notable_agents.action: person walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low concrete wall with green grass on top running parallel to the sidewalk
tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
distant building with tower and green roof visible down the street
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk with a grassy median on the right. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches an intersection, with a church-like building visible in the distance and palm trees lining the street. Few pedestrians are visible, and the traffic light ahead shows red.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with restaurant and apartment building

events.description: passing from open sidewalk into area with prominent blue apartment building and ground-floor restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking past a blue modern apartment building with a restaurant featuring red trim and outdoor seating, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking toward camera while looking at phone
people seated at outdoor dining tables of the restaurant

entered.detail: modern multi-story building with bright blue facade and balconies
ground-floor commercial space with large red-framed windows and doors
large black chalkboard menu sign on the sidewalk outside the restaurant
tables and chairs on the sidewalk with patrons seated

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk dominated by a striking blue apartment building with a ground-floor restaurant featuring red trim. Pedestrians walk in both directions, and people are seated at outdoor dining tables. A large menu chalkboard stands on the sidewalk as the character passes the establishment.

events.description: character crosses the multi-lane street at a crosswalk, moving from one sidewalk to the other

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk past parked vehicles and residential buildings

notable_agents.action: red sedan parked along the curb

entered.detail: bright red four-door sedan parked at the curb
large gray electrical utility box on the sidewalk
older two-story apartment building with green awning and barred windows
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, moving from the commercial area into a more residential zone with older apartment buildings. A red sedan is parked along the curb, and the sidewalk features utility boxes and street trees. The character continues walking past the gray apartment building with green awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with bus stop and retail buildings

events.description: approaching and passing a bus stop shelter with advertising posters

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy commercial sidewalk, passing a bus stop shelter and navigating through groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man and child standing near the bus stop shelter

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with bench and advertising panels
two-story tan brick building with green awning on the ground floor
large advertisement poster on the side of the bus shelter

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling commercial sidewalk featuring a bus stop shelter with advertising posters. A tan commercial building with a green awning stands across the street, and various pedestrians walk along the path. The area has more tree cover and feels denser than the previous residential block.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk and palm-lined street

events.description: character crosses the street at an intersection marked with STOP on the road surface

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection, walking over white crosswalk lines and STOP road marking, continuing down the street

entered.detail: large white painted letters spelling STOP on the asphalt road surface
open area of the street intersection with crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection marked with prominent white STOP lettering on the road. The area opens up with palm trees lining both sides of the street, and the character continues walking into the distance as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet street into a bustling commercial district before opening up into a wide intersection. It begins by following the character along a sidewalk with a grassy median and distant church, moving toward a red traffic light under a canopy of palm trees. As the character progresses, the scene shifts to a vibrant commercial stretch dominated by a striking blue apartment building with a ground-floor restaurant and outdoor diners. The camera then tracks the character across a marked crosswalk into a residential zone of gray buildings and green awnings, before moving back into a denser commercial area featuring a bus stop shelter and advertising posters. Finally, the environment opens up as the character crosses a wide intersection marked with prominent white stop lettering, continuing forward along a palm-lined street.
